entries.name: InotifyEvent
entries.code:
InotifyEvent {.pure, final, importc: "struct inotify_event",
               header: "<sys/inotify.h>", completeStruct.} = object
  wd* {.importc: "wd".}: FileHandle ## Watch descriptor.
  mask* {.importc: "mask".}: uint32 ## Watch mask.
  cookie* {.importc: "cookie".}: uint32 ## Cookie to synchronize two events.
  len* {.importc: "len".}: uint32 ## Length (including NULs) of name.
  name* {.importc: "name".}: UncheckedArray[char] ## Name.

entries.name: IN_ONLYDIR
entries.description: Only watch the path if it is a directory.

entries.name: IN_DONT_FOLLOW
entries.description: Do not follow a sym link.

entries.name: IN_MASK_ADD
entries.description: Add to the mask of an already existing watch.

entries.name: inotify_init
inotify_init1
entries.code:
proc inotify_init1(flags: cint): FileHandle {.cdecl, importc: "inotify_init1",
    header: "<sys/inotify.h>", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Like inotify_init , but has a flags argument that provides access to some extra functionality.

entries.name: inotify_add_watch
entries.description: Add watch of object NAME to inotify instance FD. Notify about events specified by MASK.

entries.name: inotify_rm_watch
entries.description: Remove the watch specified by WD from the inotify instance FD.

entries.name: inotify_events
entries.code:
iterator inotify_events(evs: pointer; n: int): ptr InotifyEvent {.raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Abstract the packed buffer interface to yield event object pointers.
